articles.title: UK Fuel Prices Go Down After Going Up
articles.summary: In the UK, the prices for petrol and diesel have started to fall a little bit after going up for many weeks. This is the first time prices have dropped since a war involving the US, Israel, and Iran. The RAC, a group that helps drivers, says that prices went down on Thursday and Friday. Diesel went down by 0.6p and petrol by 0.3p per litre. Now, diesel costs just under 191p a litre, and petrol is just under 158p a litre. Even with this small drop, filling a car with diesel costs about £26 more than in late February, and petrol costs nearly £14 more. The RAC thinks prices might fall more in the coming days because wholesale costs are lower. Drivers are happy to see prices going down after they went up a lot. The price rises over six weeks made diesel go from 142p to nearly 192p a litre and petrol from 133p to over 158p a litre. Fuel prices are still lower than in summer 2022 after Russia invaded Ukraine. Many people are worried about fuel costs because it makes living more expensive, with 75% of people saying fuel prices are a reason for higher costs in March, up from 38% in February. Experts say this shows people are anxious about global events affecting their money.

articles.title: A Famous Singer Loves a Glass Artist's Work
articles.summary: Anita Jenkins is a glass artist in Glasgow who makes beautiful things like sculptures and necklaces. One day, a famous singer named Tori Amos visited a shop and saw Anita's art. Tori loved it so much that she bought some pieces and asked to meet Anita. Anita was surprised and happy because she thought it might be a joke at first. They met backstage at Tori's concert, where Tori had hung Anita's art in her dressing room. They chatted like friends, and Tori praised Anita's work. This made Anita feel very proud and gave her a boost in confidence and money. Anita's art is sold in a shop that helps many local artists in Scotland.

articles.title: Are Video Games Getting More Love in the UK?
articles.summary: This article talks about video games in the UK. It starts with the Bafta Games Awards, which celebrate games from around the world, including a popular French game called Clair Obscur: Expedition 33. The article asks if video games are as respected in the UK as other creative things like movies or music. It mentions big games made in Britain, like Grand Theft Auto and Tomb Raider, and says the UK game industry is worth a lot of money, £8.76 billion in 2025. But there are problems too, like job losses and studios closing. A game expert named Alanah Pearce says it's hard to get money for games because investors are more interested in AI. The article wonders if things are changing for games in the UK.

articles.title: Pokémon Card Robberies in the UK
articles.summary: Pokémon cards are being stolen from shops in the UK because they have become very valuable. These cards are collectible items that people have enjoyed for 30 years, but recently, some rare cards have sold for millions of pounds. This has made criminals interested in stealing them. Shops in places like Warrington, Rugby, and Bristol have been broken into, with thieves taking cards worth thousands of pounds. The police are working together to stop these crimes. Experts say thieves think Pokémon cards are easier to steal than banks or jewelry stores. One shop owner described how robbers used a van and broke glass to steal cards quickly. This shows how the high prices of Pokémon cards are leading to more thefts.

articles.title: Lana Del Rey Sings for a James Bond Game
articles.summary: Lana Del Rey, a famous singer, will sing the main song for a new James Bond video game called 007 First Light. The song was written by David Arnold, who has made music for Bond movies before. This is exciting because Lana tried to write a song for a Bond film in 2015, but it was not used. Now, she gets another chance. The game will come out in May. The song starts slow and then gets louder with an orchestra. Other singers have also sung for Bond games in the past. This game tells a new story about young James Bond joining MI6. It is the first Bond game since 2012.

articles.title: Victoria Beckham Talks About Being a Good Parent After Family Disagreement
articles.summary: Victoria Beckham has spoken out for the first time about a family disagreement with her son Brooklyn. She says she and her husband David have always tried to be the best parents they can be. Brooklyn posted on Instagram in January, saying his parents tried to ruin his relationship with his wife Nicola and that family love depends on promoting their public image. Victoria responded in an interview, explaining that they love their children and have tried to protect them for over 30 years in the public eye. She wished Brooklyn a happy birthday last month. Brooklyn's claims include that his mother canceled making Nicola's wedding dress and danced inappropriately at the wedding. Some guests agree with parts of his story, while others say it's not fully true. David Beckham hasn't commented directly but said children can make mistakes.
